expect: Closure classifier extended to domain frontiers; dispatch shows ≥3 verdicts; L-1117 enforced structurally
actual: 101 domain frontiers scored across 36 domains. 3 CLOSEABLE (F-CAT1 9/10, F-INV1 8/10, F-INV2 8/10), 15 APPROACHING, 35 NEEDS_WORK, 48 BLOCKED. dispatch_optimizer.py now shows closure verdicts inline. L-1117 enforced structurally.
diff: Expected >=3 verdicts visible in dispatch. Got 3 CLOSEABLE + 15 APPROACHING visible per domain. Exceeded expectations — full frontier landscape now classified.
method: 5-dimension heuristic classifier (evidence_saturation, test_clarity, recency, independence, partial_resolution; 0-2 each, max 10). Applied to all active domain frontiers via regex parsing of FRONTIER.md files.
